_comment: Copy this file to <your-project>/.ollamapilot/mcp.json and configure the servers you want. OllamaPilot loads MCP servers from that location at startup.

servers._comment: Local filesystem — always recommended. Gives the agent read/write access to workspace files via MCP protocol.
servers.name: filesystem

servers._comment: Date/time — gives the agent current date, time, timezone, and date arithmetic. No API key needed.
servers.name: time

servers._comment: URL fetch — reads any web page as clean markdown. No API key needed. Install: npm install -g @modelcontextprotocol/server-fetch
servers.name: fetch

servers._comment: Brave web search — web_search tool with real results. Get a free key at https://api.search.brave.com. Install: npm install -g @modelcontextprotocol/server-brave-search
servers.name: brave-search

servers._comment: PostgreSQL — query, list_tables, describe_table. Replace the connection string. Install: npm install -g @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres
servers.name: postgres

servers._comment: PDF reader — extract text from local PDF files. Requires Python. Install: pip install mcp-server-pdf
servers.name: pdf

servers._comment: Git — git_log, git_diff, git_blame, git_show. Install: npm install -g @modelcontextprotocol/server-git
servers.name: git

servers._comment: Sequential thinking — structured multi-step reasoning tool for complex planning tasks.
servers.name: sequential-thinking
